name: CompTIA A+
description: Entry-level technician certification covering hardware, operating systems, networking, security, troubleshooting, and operational procedures across two core exams.

name: CompTIA Network+
description: Vendor-neutral networking certification covering network concepts, implementation, operations, security, and troubleshooting. Original content with a dedicated lesson and practice set for every N10-009 exam objective.

name: CompTIA Security+
description: Vendor-neutral baseline cybersecurity certification covering security concepts, threats and mitigations, security architecture, security operations, and governance. Original content with a dedicated lesson and practice set for every SY0-701 exam objective.
